zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margaret Scott於1427年出生在英國英格蘭肯特布拉布恩時，她的父親Sir William Scott, Knight of Kent, sword-bearer to Henry V at Agincourt37歲，母親Isabel Herbert Finch22歲。她於1449年與John Sharpe在英國英格蘭肯特貝嫩登結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1514年1月29日在英國諾福爾可奧可波洛享年87歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可奧可波洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Margaret Scott于1427年出生在英国英格兰肯特布拉布恩时，她的父亲Sir William Scott, Knight of Kent, sword-bearer to Henry V at Agincourt37岁，母亲Isabel Herbert Finch22岁。她于1449年与John Sharpe在英国英格兰肯特貝嫩登结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1514年1月29日在英国諾福爾可奧可波洛享年87岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可奧可波洛。

nameMeanings.name: Scott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (Down): habitational and ethnic name from Middle English Scot ‘man from Scotland’. There is no evidence that the surname denoted either of the earlier senses of Scot as ‘(Gaelic-speaking) Irishman’ or ‘man from Alba’, the Gaelic-speaking region of Scotland north of the river Forth. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English and Scottish: from the rare Middle English personal name Scot (Old English Scott, possibly also Old Norse Skotr), only certainly attested in northern England.

variants.name: Scutt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Camille, Pierre.
English: nickname for a short person, from Middle English scut(e) ‘short’, or else for a swift runner, from Middle English scut ‘hare’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margaret Scott was born in 1427, in Brabourne, Kent, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir William Scott, Knight of Kent, sword-bearer to Henry V at Agincourt, was 37 and her mother, Isabel Herbert Finch, was 22. She married John Sharpe in 1449, in Benenden, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 29 January 1514, in Oxborough, Norfolk, England, at the age of 87, and was buried in Oxborough, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Margaret Scott est née en 1427, à Brabourne, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Scott, Knight of Kent, sword-bearer to Henry V at Agincourt, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Isabel Herbert Finch, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé John Sharpe en 1449, à Benenden, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée le 29 janvier 1514, à Oxborough, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 87 ans, et a été enterrée à Oxborough, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Margaret Scott 1427 in Brabourne, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Scott, Knight of Kent, sword-bearer to Henry V at Agincourt 37 und ihre Mutter Isabel Herbert Finch 22. Sie hat 1449 in Benenden, Kent, England, United Kingdom John Sharpe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb am 29. Januar 1514 im Alter von 87 Jahren in Oxborough, Norfolk, England und wurde in Oxborough, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Scott è nata il nel 1427 nel Brabourne, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir William Scott, Knight of Kent, sword-bearer to Henry V at Agincourt, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Isabel Herbert Finch, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato John Sharpe nel 1449, nel Benenden, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 29 gennaio 1514, nel Oxborough, Norfolk, England, all'età di 87 anni, e fu sepolta a Oxborough, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Scottが1427年にイギリスイギリスケントブラボウルンで生まれた時，父Sir William Scott, Knight of Kent, sword-bearer to Henry V at Agincourtは37歳，母Isabel Herbert Finchは22歳であった。1449年にイギリスイギリスケントベンエンデンでJohn Sharpeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1514年1月29日にイギリスノーフォルクオクスボロウで87歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクオクスボロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Scott(이)가 1427년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 브라보우른에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Scott, Knight of Kent, sword-bearer to Henry V at Agincourt(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Herbert Finch(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1449년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 베니든에서 John Sharpe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1514년 1월 29일 영국 노르폴크 스버루에서 87세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 스버루에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Scott nasceu em 1427, em Brabourne, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William Scott, Knight of Kent, sword-bearer to Henry V at Agincourt, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Herbert Finch, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com John Sharpe em 1449, em Benenden, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 29 de janeiro de 1514, em Oxborough, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 87 anos, e foi sepultada em Oxborough, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margaret Scott родилась в 1427 г. в местности брабурн, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir William Scott, Knight of Kent, sword-bearer to Henry V at Agincourt было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Herbert Finch, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Sharpe в 1449 г. в местности биненден, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла 29 января 1514 г. в местности оксбороую, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 87 лет и была похоронена в местности оксбороую, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Margaret Scott nació en 1427, en Brabourne, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William Scott, Knight of Kent, sword-bearer to Henry V at Agincourt, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Isabel Herbert Finch, tenía 22 años. Se casó con John Sharpe en 1449, en Benenden, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 29 de enero de 1514, en Oxborough, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 87 años, y fue sepultada en Oxborough, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
